title: Jamaican Midnight Bake
description: A delicious and comforting Jamaican-inspired bake recipe, perfect for satisfying your midnight cravings. This dish combines the sweetness of yautia with the bold flavors of Jamaica.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the diced yautia, melted coconut oil, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground cumin, dried thyme, and bake seasoning. Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
